amRdata 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • intro

Convert Panaroo gene presence/absence matrix to a per-genome gene count table

Source: R/data_processing.R
dot-panaroo2geneTable.Rd

Reads gene_presence_absence.csv (from runPanaroo() or mergePanaroo() outputs), reshapes it into a genome-by-gene count matrix, and writes the result to DuckDB as a table named "gene_count". Returns the reshaped tibble for immediate use.

  • Converts presence strings to counts by splitting semicolon-delimited entries: empty -> 0, "A;B;C" -> 3.

.panaroo2geneTable(panaroo_output_path, duckdb_path)

Arguments

panaroo_output_path

Character scalar. Path to Panaroo output directory;

duckdb_path

Character scalar. Path to the DuckDB database file to use

Value

A tibble with:

genome_id

Character column of normalized genome IDs.

Integer counts per gene (0 if absent, >=1 if present, counting semicolon-separated entries).

(writing table into DuckDB).

Contents
